name: KASH & Services
description_short: KASH & Services is a Charlotte-based multi-service financial firm offering tax preparation, tax resolution, bookkeeping, notary, and estate planning alongside business setup and dispatch services.
description_long:
KASH & Services operates as a diversified financial services provider based in Charlotte, NC, at 11709 Fruehauf Dr Ste 111. The company markets itself as a one-stop-shop for both personal and business financial needs, with a stated commitment to customer satisfaction and best interests. Founded with a mission to serve the Charlotte community, the firm has built a presence on social media platforms including Facebook and Instagram.

The company's primary service offerings span tax and accounting services (tax preparation for personal, business, and corporate entities, tax resolution, and bookkeeping), legal document services (notary public, estate planning), business formation assistance, and administrative solutions (virtual address services). Additionally, KASH & Services operates KASH Logistix, a separate division focused on transportation and freight dispatching, including assistance starting transportation companies without CDL requirements.

KASH & Services distinguishes itself through horizontal service integration—combining tax preparation with estate planning, notary services, and business setup rather than specializing narrowly. The company emphasizes accessibility, positioning itself as a one-location solution for multiple financial tasks. Their Facebook presence shows 100% recommendation rate across 18 reviews, and they actively engage with tax filing reminders and community outreach.

However, the website provides limited detail about credentials, certifications, pricing, or specific service methodologies. Credit repair is listed on the homepage but no detailed information about dispute processes, timelines, or results is provided. The company operates as a generalist practice across many service categories, which may indicate varying levels of specialization and expertise in each area. Consumers should verify relevant licensure (tax preparation credentials, notary status) and request detailed service agreements before engaging.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Multiple complementary services available at single location—tax prep, notary, estate planning, business setup
Serves business and personal clients with range including corporate tax preparation
100% recommendation rate across reviews on Facebook with active community engagement
Offers business formation support alongside tax services, useful for entrepreneurs
Provides virtual address services for business clients requiring professional mailing addresses
Charlotte-based with physical location and contact information publicly listed
Active social media presence with regular customer engagement
cons: Website lacks information about staff credentials, licenses, or relevant certifications for tax services
No pricing information, service costs, or fee structures disclosed on website or social media
Credit repair services mentioned but no details provided about dispute methodology, timelines, or results
Generalist approach across many service categories (tax, legal, logistics) raises questions about specialization depth
Limited testimonial detail; reviews mention satisfaction but don't specify which services were used
best_for: Small business owners needing integrated tax preparation and business setup services
Entrepreneurs launching transportation companies seeking both business formation and dispatch support
Individuals seeking multiple document services (notary, estate planning) at one location
diagnosis: KASH & Services functions as a generalist financial services firm best suited for small business owners and individuals seeking bundled tax, business setup, and administrative services in Charlotte. The critical caveat is the absence of published credentials, pricing, and specific details about credit repair processes—consumers must directly verify certifications and service methodologies before engagement, particularly for tax and legal services.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
